Healthy: No action needed. Maintain current care.
Early Blight: Use copper-based fungicide and remove infected leaves.
Late Blight: Apply systemic fungicide; destroy diseased plants.
Leaf Spot: Use phosphorous fungicide and improve air circulation.
Rust: Apply sulfur fungicides and dispose of infected plant parts.
Powdery Mildew: Use neem oil or potassium bicarbonate spray.
